totalav.lahde: HAVAINTO: totalav.com/app/windows -sivulla tuotekuvan yhteydessä lukee 'TOP PRODUCT November 2025' osana Windows-antivirusohjelman esittelyä.
HAVAINTO: sama sivu listaa badgien joukossa 'VB100 April 2025'.

fsecure.lahde: HAVAINTO: f-secure.com/us-en/awards -sivulla: 'F-Secure Internet Security has earned AV‑Comparatives Anti-Phishing Certification 2026 for its ability to protect users from phishing websites... AV-Comparatives (June 2026).'

fsecure.nimi: AV-TEST Certified for Android / Top Product -sertifioinnit
fsecure.lahde: HAVAINTO: sama sivu: 'F‑Secure Total has received the Certified for Android commendation by AV-TEST' ja 'F‑Secure Total was tested by the independent organization AV‑TEST and rated as a Top Product for Windows security.'

avg.lahde: HAVAINTO: avg.com/en-se/awards -sivu listaa toistuvasti mm. 'AVG Internet Security — VB100 — August 2024' ja useita AV-TEST-organisaation myöntämiä 'Home User Protection Test' -sertifikaatteja.

eset.lahde: HAVAINTO: eset.com/us/business/cybersecurity-compliance-for-business/ -sivulla: 'ESET strengthens security with ISO 27001 certification. ...ESET has achieved ISO 27001 certification for our core processes and services.' UKK: 'ESET is ISO 27001:2022 and ISO 9001:2015 certified.'
HAVAINTO: sama sivu: 'SOC 2 Type 2 — ESET has achieved SOC 2 Type 2 attestation, demonstrating our continuous commitment to effectively safeguard customer data.'

norton.lahde: HAVAINTO: us.norton.com/awards -sivulla listataan mm. '2026 AV-Comparatives — Advanced+ Malware Protection — March 2026' ja 'Advanced+ Performance — April 2026'.

norton.nimi: AV-TEST Best Usability / Best MacOS Security -sertifioinnit
norton.lahde: HAVAINTO: sama sivu: '2025 AV-TEST — Norton 360 — Best Usability 2025' ja 'AV-TEST — Norton 360 — Best MacOS Security 2025'.

avast.lahde: HAVAINTO: avast.com/awards-certifications -sivulla: 'Best Protection — AV-Test — December 2024', 'Corporate Endpoint Protection Test — AV-Test — December 2024', 'Business Security Test — AV-Comparatives'.
HAVAINTO: sama sivu listaa myös 'Security Evaluation Test: Home Anti-Malware — SE Labs — 2025'.

bitdefender.lahde: HAVAINTO: bitdefender.com/en-us/partners/certifications/av-comparatives-certified -sivulla: 'AV-COMPARATIVES CERTIFIED. Certification by AV-Comparatives provides an official and independent seal of approval for software performance which is globally recognized.'

HAVAINTO: bitdefender.com/en-us/partners/certifications/soc2-tyoe2-compliant -sivulla: 'Bitdefender is Service Organization Control 2 (SOC2) Type 2 certified... Our security controls are audited each year, following the AICPA SSAE-16 SOC 2 guidelines.'

kaspersky.lahde: HAVAINTO: kaspersky.com/about/press-releases/kaspersky-achieves-iso-27001-certification -sivulla: 'Kaspersky...has achieved ISO/IEC 27001:2013 certification... Issued by TÜV AUSTRIA, the certification confirms that the company's data security systems, including Kaspersky Security Network, meet industry best practices.'

HAVAINTO: sama sivu: 'In 2019 the company achieved the SOC 2 Type 1 audit, issued by one of the Big Four accounting firms, which confirms that the development and release of Kaspersky's AV databases are protected from unauthorized changes by strong security controls.'
